periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 71. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Tuesday
periods.detailed_forecast: Rain showers likely before 11am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Cloudy, with a high near 78. Southwest wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

periods.name: Tuesday Night
periods.short_forecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 8pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 72. South wind 3 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 8am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 86. Southwest wind 8 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
